record.field: from datetime import date, timedelta to_d = date.today() from_d = to_d - timedelta(days=365) res = model.run_all(date_from=str(from_d), date_to=str(to_d)) action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Audit run complete', 'message': 'run_id=%s summary=%s' % (res['run_id'], res['summary']), 'sticky': True, 'type': 'success' if res['summary'].get('error',0) == 0 else 'warning', }, }
